description_long: This is a small, boxy convenience store with a flat, corrugated metal roof and a prominent overhanging awning in a rusty orange color. The exterior walls are clad in vertically ribbed, weathered metal panels in faded blue-gray and off-white tones, giving the building a utilitarian, slightly aged appearance. The front features a wide, glass storefront with large windows and a central open entrance, while the sides have additional large windows with visible posters or advertisements inside. The rear of the building is plain, with a single solid metal door and no windows. The structure sits on a concrete base that extends outward to form a narrow walkway or step. The overall design is functional and typical of older, urban convenience stores found in industrial or mixed-use neighborhoods.
description: A boxy, weathered convenience store with a flat metal roof, large glass storefront, and rusty orange awning. The exterior features ribbed metal panels and a concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide glass storefront, open entrance, and prominent rusty orange awning.
description_view_1: Side view with large display windows, visible interior posters, and the overhanging awning extending partially along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a plain metal door, no windows, and the ribbed metal wall panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with large display windows and partial awning, similar to the other side.
attribute_glass_entrance_doors: none; entrance is an open passage with no visible glass doors
attribute_display_windows: Large, horizontally-oriented display windows on both sides of the entrance, framed in metal, transparent, with visible interior posters and advertisements.
